title: smoky pillowy portuguese cheese curds paella
description: a hearty portuguese solo-dinner featuring smoky cheese curds, perfect for a weeknight meal.
instructions: heat the olive oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
add the chorizo and cook until lightly browned, about 2 minutes.
add the mushrooms and bell pepper and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
add the smoked paprika and cook for 1 minute.
add the smoked portuguese cheese curds and chicken broth, and bring to a simmer.
reduce heat to low and steam for 10 minutes, or until the cheese curds are melted and the liquid has been absorbed.
season with lemon juice to taste, and serve hot.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
